channel.title: Workshop on Internship Report
channel.description: Recent content in Workshop on Internship Report

item.title: 5.3. Create Budget and Select Region
item.description:
AWS Budgets is utilized to control costs and prevent projects from over-running resources, which helps avoid unexpected charges.

In this section, we will perform two main steps:

1. Access AWS Budgets

Instructions on how to access the AWS Budgets management interface from the AWS Console via search bar or navigation path.

2. Create a Cost Budget

Step-by-step guidance to create a Cost Budget based on a predefined configuration template to manage your budget efficiently.
